en: I was wondering if you could maybe teach me a little physics.
ko: 제가 물리학을 조금 배울 수 있을지 궁금해요.

en: A little physics? There's no such thing.
Physics encompasses the entire universe, from quantum particles to supernovas,
from spinning electrons to spinning galaxies.
Yeah, okay, cool. I don't need the PBS special.
I just want to know enough so I can talk to Leonard about his job.
ko: 저는 레너드와 그의 일에 대해 이야기할 만큼만 알고 싶어요,

en: You know, like Bernadette does. Why can't Leonard teach you?
Because I want to surprise him. Can't you surprise him in some other way?
For example, I'm sure he'd be delightfully taken aback if you cleaned your apartment.
ko: 예를 들어, 그가 기쁘게 놀랄 거예요,

en: Come on, Sheldon, this is important to me.
Penny, this would be a massive undertaking, and my time is both limited and valuable.
We're sitting here playing video games all day.
ko: 우리는 하루 종일 비디오 게임을 하고 있어요.

en: Okay, point. Now, what sort of foundation do you have?
Did you take any science classes in school? Sure, I did the one with the frogs.
